call.waitingSubtitle: Waiting for the other person to speak…
call.playgroundTip: Send phrase to the AI training playground
call.expandPeerSub: Peer full screen, you in the corner
call.connectionError: Could not connect to the room
call.roomFull: 🚫 Room is full — 2 participants already inside

coach.title: AI assistant: how to reply
coach.promptPlaceholder: Ask anything — about the dialogue or any question of yours

tonePrompts.joke: Reply with a light, fitting joke
tonePrompts.deep: Give a deep analytical answer with reasoning
tonePrompts.scientific: Reply as a scientist, with references to research or data
tonePrompts.empathic: Reply empathically, acknowledging the other person's feelings

roomActions.deleteSub: Close the meeting and erase all data

billing.quotaExhaustedSub: Translator bot is paused. Top up minutes.
billing.lowBalanceSub: Top up minutes so the conversation isn't interrupted.

billing.paywallLowBalance: No minutes on balance — choose a plan or top up

changePwd.title: Change password
changePwd.errSameAsOld: New password matches the old one
changePwd.errNoPassword: Password change is unavailable for this account (Google sign-in).
changePwd.errSuperAdmin: The super-admin password is set in the server configuration.

partner.title: Partner program
partner.subtitle: Share your link and earn
partner.termsEmpty: Program terms are not set yet. Please contact SuperAdmin.

sip.title: SIP Telephony
sip.subtitle: Configure trunks for incoming and outgoing calls

incoming.heading: Incoming SIP calls
incoming.lead: Unique SIP address for forwarding external calls from your provider into VibeVox.
incoming.emptyTitle: No SIP address for incoming calls
incoming.emptyHint: Create a unique SIP URI + login/password so clients can call you from any phone, and VibeVox will translate their voice in real time.
incoming.activeHint: Bridge translator is listening to the room. Every call is translated in real time.
incoming.pausedHint: Activate reception so VibeVox starts translating incoming calls.

outbound.heading: Outgoing call
outbound.lead: Call a phone number from the web interface — VibeVox will automatically translate your conversation in real time.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: Configure an outbound SIP trunk first
outbound.noTrunkHint: Fill in the «New SIP trunk» form at the top of the page — VibeVox will use your SIP provider (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, …) for outbound calls.
outbound.configureFirst: Configure an outbound SIP trunk first (form above)
outbound.invalidNumber: Enter a valid number in international format (+XXXXXXXXXXX)

howTo.heading: How to set up
howTo.step1: Get SIP trunk credentials from your provider (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: Enter them into the form above and save.
howTo.step3: VibeVox will automatically create an outbound SIP trunk in LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: Coming soon: incoming SIP URI for forwarding external calls.

tenantOnly.title: SIP trunks are configured at the tenant level
tenantOnly.hint1: You cannot configure SIP telephony under a superadmin account (without a UUID tenant).
tenantOnly.hint2: Sign in as a regular user with their own tenantId to create a trunk.

sip.connected: SIP trunk saved and synchronized with LiveKit

danger.deleteTrunkHint: The configuration will be deleted. Outgoing calls will stop until you create a trunk again.
danger.deleteInboundHint: The LiveKit inbound trunk and dispatch rule will be deleted. Incoming calls will stop being routed.
danger.reissueHint: Reissues the login and password for the SIP address. Old credentials will stop working.

outbound2.rateInfo: The cost of an outgoing call minute is set by your SIP provider.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: This action is irreversible. After deletion, outgoing calls will stop until a new trunk is created.
confirm.deleteInboundBody: This action is irreversible. The inbound trunk + dispatch rule in LiveKit Cloud will be removed.

page.title: Enterprise Settings
page.subtitle: All integrations, keys, and AI parameters for your account
page.upsellTitle: This section is available on the Enterprise plan
page.upsellBody: Here you configure: personal Gemini API key, prompt and knowledge base, Quest Flow + Telegram bot integration, and Chatwoot CRM connection.

gemini.heading: Google Gemini API key
gemini.lead: Personal key from AI Studio. Used instead of the global key for all Gemini calls of your account.
gemini.leadSuffix: . Used instead of the global key for all Gemini calls of your account.
gemini.successValid: Key is valid — Gemini API is available.
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: AI features will use the shared VibeVox key (if configured).

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Save and verify the API key first — image generation needs it.
imageModel.hint: Nano Banana does generation, editing and composition. Imagen only generates from scratch.

telegram.heading: Telegram bot for notifications
telegram.lead: Create a bot via @BotFather and paste its token. Everyone who sends /start to this bot will receive notifications: new clients, tags, integration errors. You can subscribe several employees or add the bot to a group/channel — broadcast goes to each automatically.
telegram.leadAfterStart: to this bot will receive notifications: new clients, tags, integration errors. You can subscribe several employees or add the bot to a group/channel — broadcast goes to each automatically.
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} saved. Welcome delivered to {{sent}} subscribers.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} saved. Notifications will be sent to everyone who messages it /start.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Message delivered to {{count}} recipients. Check Telegram.
telegram.testTooltip: Send a test notification via the bot
telegram.confirmUnlinkBody: Subscribers will also be removed — notifications will stop arriving.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

prompt.heading: Prompts
prompt.subtitle: Prompt and knowledge base only for transcription in video rooms
prompt.warning: Do not confuse with Quest Flow
prompt.appendNote: You can extend with your own rules — they will be combined with the default.
prompt.headerLeadBold1: only for transcribing messages in video rooms
prompt.headerLeadPart2: — when in chat you click a message and choose the tone
prompt.contextLeadPart1: Used when you click a message in a video room chat and select the tone
prompt.contextLeadPart2: . The knowledge base (below) is also mixed in.
prompt.defaultSummary: What AI uses by default (if your field is empty) — click to view
prompt.extendNoteText: with your own rules / style / terminology — they will be combined with the default prompt above and the knowledge base.
prompt.kbHeading: Knowledge base — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Upload a document — catalog, FAQ, price list, regulations, hint material. The content is parsed on the server (Word/Excel/CSV → text) and mixed in by AI when transcribing messages in video rooms. Limit: 50 MB file / 500,000 characters in DB.
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: All uploaded documents will disappear. This action cannot be undone.
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: In an Enterprise room chat you'll be able to select any message and ask AI to explain it in the chosen tone. The button
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: uses your prompt from the field above.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: AI replies to clients via Telegram bots and Inbound API
questFlow.warning: If field is empty — VibeVox's default prompt is used
questFlow.headerLead: AI dialogue with each client individually via Telegram bot connected in Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysLead: Each key is a secret you paste into the Quest Flow HTTP block. VibeVox uses it to identify your account. You can create several keys for different flows.
questFlow.createdWarning: ⚠ Save the key — it is shown only once
questFlow.noKeysHint: No keys yet. Create the first one.
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: The key will be deleted permanently. Quest Flow will stop working through it — you will need to create a new key and replace it in the flow.
questFlow.promptLead1: Defines HOW the AI talks to clients via Quest Flow: tone, style, what to extract.
questFlow.promptLead2: — the shared VibeVox prompt (below) is used.
questFlow.promptLeadBold2: If you fill in your own
questFlow.promptLead3: — it will be combined with the base prompt and the knowledge base.
questFlow.defaultSummary: What AI uses by default (if your field is empty) — click to view
questFlow.kbLead1: Documents — service catalog, price list, FAQ. Upload TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — the AI will not know company facts, it will answer only from general knowledge. This base is
questFlow.kbLead3: from the “Prompts” section — that one is for video transcription. Limit: 50 MB file / 500,000 characters in DB.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: The Quest Flow knowledge base will be cleared. This action cannot be undone.
questFlow.tagsLead: AI assigns these tags to clients if a match is detected in the dialogue. Tags appear on the client's room card and are passed to CRM (Section 4).

chatwoot.heading: CRM (Chatwoot) integration
chatwoot.subtitle: Automatically send call history and tags to Chatwoot.
chatwoot.headerLead: Passes dialogue history and client need tags to Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Agent Access Token (from Profile → Access Token)
chatwoot.successSaved: Saved. Now click “Test connection” to verify.
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Conversation with private note = full dialogue history
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Sent on manual click of “Send to CRM” in the room chat. Automatic sending on tag detection — next feature.

chat.composerPlaceholder: Write a message to the client…
chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: This action cannot be undone. The text and attached media files will be deleted.
chat.deleteMessageConfirmMediaNote: The physical file on the server will also be deleted.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: Room chat is an Enterprise feature. Upgrade your plan in the «Plans» section.
chat.empty: No messages in this chat yet.

insights.title: Dialogue analysis
insights.tooShort: The conversation is too short to analyze.

lobby.title: Joining the video meeting
lobby.subtitle: Video call with real-time AI translation
lobby.languageHint: You will hear and see the other person's subtitles in this language.
lobby.shareHint: Copy and send it to the other person to invite them to the meeting.
lobby.tosAgree: By joining, you agree to the
lobby.audioConsent: , and you consent to processing audio for translation.
lobby.roomFullMsg: There is already a participant in the meeting. Contact the meeting creator or start a new one.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ Link copied. Send it via Telegram / WhatsApp / Email. You can close the page — the link is always valid.

paywall.titleNoSub: To create a room, choose a plan
paywall.titleLowBalance: No minutes on balance — choose a plan or top up
paywall.subtitle: Pick a plan or top up minutes — pay via Stripe, return right here.
paywall.topupNote: Minutes will be added to your balance instantly after payment.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ You don't have an active subscription. Plus €19/mo will be added — 60 minutes are included with the plan at no extra cost.
paywall.stripeNote: Payments secured by Stripe. Minutes are credited automatically after payment.

billingPage.title: Plans and payment
billingPage.subtitle: All VibeVox features — pick a plan that matches your rhythm.
billingPage.untilEndOfPeriod: until the end of the paid period
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Cancel auto-renewal. The subscription stays active until the end of the current period.
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: The next payment will go through at the end of the current period.
billingPage.promoHint: The discount will apply automatically when subscribing or topping up minutes.
billingPage.checkoutNoUrl: Stripe Checkout URL was not returned
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: Minutes carried over from the previous period. Spent first.
billingPage.topupHelp: Top-up slider. Available when a subscription is active.
billingPage.featureLearnHub: AI Learning Hub — your own dialects
billingPage.featureRollover: Carry minutes to the next month
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Hello! I'm interested in the VibeVox Enterprise plan.
billingPage.faqA1: Unused minutes are carried over to the next calendar month. They expire on the third one.
billingPage.faqQ2: Can I cancel the subscription at any time?
billingPage.faqA2: Yes. Cancel from your account with one click. The paid period continues until its end.
billingPage.faqA3: Full AI stack: client cards with auto-recognition, Telegram auth, personal prompts, Google Calendar, smart needs tagging, CRM export, questflow.pro integration, separate admin tab.
billingPage.faqA4: Any RFC-compliant one: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, etc. VibeVox creates the outbound trunk automatically.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 per minute. From 60 minutes to 10 hours. Credited instantly after payment.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Plan minutes remain available until that date, additional top-ups still work.
billingPage.cancelDetailAutoClose: After that — the subscription closes automatically.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: Auto-renewal cancelled · subscription will close on {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Plan minutes remain available until that date, additional top-ups still work. Click «Resume» if you changed your mind.
billingPage.languagesLead: Full list of languages supported by real-time synchronous translation. Source language is auto-detected — each participant only picks their own.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: Language not found in the supported list
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Try different spelling — for example in English or local script. If the language is truly missing — message us and we'll add it.

forgot.successHint: Check your inbox {{email}}. If there's no email — check spam.

reset.title: New password

reset.successHint: You can now sign in with your new password.
reset.invalidLink: The link is invalid or expired. Request a new password reset.

seo.title: VibeVox — Real-time AI translation for video calls and SIP
seo.description: VibeVox is a synchronous voice AI translation platform supporting 100+ languages. Video calls, SIP telephony, customer chat, AI conversation analysis.
seo.keywords: AI translation, synchronous translation, video call translation, SIP telephony, voice translator

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: VibeVox is a synchronous AI translator for voice and video calls in 100+ languages. WebRTC and SIP telephony, AI assistant, real-time speech-to-speech — works on every device.
pwaInstall.installCta: Install VibeVox to your home screen — one tap to launch translated calls, SIP and the AI assistant. Works like a native app.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Add to home screen — one-tap launch
